Name: Columbia Direct Drywall Corner Flusher
Description:
Columbia 2.5" Direct Drywall Corner Flusher (2.5DF) provides professional-grade precision for finishing internal drywall corners. Engineered for high-volume job sites, this tool applies joint compound and feathers edges in a single, efficient pass, minimizing the need for manual cleanup or sanding. Each unit is individually hand-ground and verified on a granite surface plate to ensure absolute flatness and a consistent finish across every angle.

Built for durability, the flusher features a solid billet machined core and a surgical-grade stainless steel body that resists deformation under heavy use. The included wheels reduce friction by up to 80%, allowing for smoother operation and preventing skipping when used with extension handles. For those who prefer a traditional feel, the wheels can be easily removed using the provided Allen key. This tool is compatible with all standard angle head and flusher handles, featuring a secure retainer clip for reliable attachment.

Features:

  • Precision Engineering: Each flusher is hand-ground and tested for accuracy to ensure a uniform, professional finish on every pass.
  • Friction-Reduced Operation: Standard-equipped wheels significantly lower resistance, facilitating effortless movement and eliminating skipping on extension handles.
  • Durable Construction: Manufactured with a solid billet core and surgical-grade stainless steel to maintain structural integrity and resist corrosion.
  • Versatile Design: Includes an Allen key for optional wheel removal, allowing for a customized feel based on user preference.
  • Universal Compatibility: Designed to integrate seamlessly with most standard angle heads and flusher handles via a secure locking clip.

Name: Columbia 32" Tomahawk Smoothing Blade (TSB-32)

This professional-grade blade features a robust, all-metal construction that eliminates the structural weaknesses found in tools relying on plastic components, ensuring long-term reliability under heavy job site pressure. By utilizing a direct-connect design for standard Flat Box handle systems, it removes the need for fragile plastic adaptors, resulting in superior stability and precise control over the angle of attack during operation.

The 32-inch width provides an ideal balance for high-production environments, allowing for efficient surface coverage and streak-free finishes in fewer passes. The blade is designed for durability and ease of maintenance, featuring an interchangeable blade system that allows for quick replacements without needing to replace the entire housing.

Features:

Name: Maxxbox Extra High Capacity Finishing Box W/ Easyroll Wheels
Description:
TapeTech 10" MAXXBOX Extra High Capacity Finishing Box with EasyRoll Wheels is engineered to optimize the balance between joint compound capacity and tool weight. This high-capacity finisher allows professionals to apply more compound during the critical first and second coats, significantly reducing the number of refills required without adding unnecessary bulk during the final pass. The integrated EasyRoll wheel system provides a stable, guided path for finishing outside corner beads, enabling faster application on metal, paper-faced, vinyl, and bullnose corner trims.

Designed for efficiency, the MAXXBOX features a solid-hinged pressure plate that swings wide for rapid, thorough cleaning. The precision dial adjustment allows for exact control over the compound crown, ensuring consistent feathering on flat joints and butt seams. This tool is compatible with all major brands of flat box brake handles, making it a versatile addition to any professional drywall finishing setup.

Features:

  • Optimized Capacity: Delivers up to 60% more usable joint compound than standard finishing boxes, increasing productivity on first and second coats.
  • EasyRoll Wheel System: Features wide, integrated shoulders that guide the box along corner beads, eliminating the need for aftermarket attachments or manual tilting.
  • Precision Control: Adjustable crown dial allows for accurate compound application and seamless feathering across various joint types.
  • Easy Maintenance: Solid-hinged pressure plate design allows the box to open fully for quick and efficient cleaning.

Description:

This high-capacity tool utilizes integrated reverse springs to provide power-assisted compound application, effectively reducing the physical effort required compared to standard finishing boxes. Name: Tapetech Easyclean Nail Spotter
Description:
TapeTech 3" EasyClean Nail Spotter (NS03TT) streamlines the drywall finishing process by efficiently filling and wiping fastener indentations in a single pass. Engineered for high-volume performance, this tool eliminates the need for manual spot finishing, ensuring consistent results across walls and ceilings. The integrated EasyClean lid and gasket system allow for rapid disassembly and maintenance, minimizing downtime between jobs.

Built with a durable stainless steel body, this spotter features a hardened steel skid plate that acts as both a pivot point and a protective barrier for the blade. This design ensures smooth movement over uneven surfaces while preventing damage from fasteners that may not be fully seated. The included adapter provides seamless compatibility with standard interchangeable handles, offering the reach necessary for elevated work without requiring stilts.

Features:

  • Efficient Application: Simultaneously fills fastener depressions and removes excess joint compound for a clean, professional finish.
  • EasyClean System: Incorporates a quick-release latch and gasket design for fast, thorough cleaning.
  • Durable Construction: Fabricated from high-grade stainless steel to resist corrosion and ensure long-term reliability.
  • Protective Skid Plate: Hardened steel plate protects the blade from protruding screw or nail heads and facilitates smooth gliding.
  • Handle Compatibility: Includes the NSA-TT adapter for use with FHTT and XHTT interchangeable handle systems.
